text:
Once there was a girl named Luna. She dreamed of stars. Each night she star-gazed, observing constellations. When she couldn't see them, she imagined them dancing.

One winter night, Luna noticed something unusual. Stars weren't twinkling brightly like usual. Instead, they seemed distant shadows. Curious, she looked deeper into the night sky.

Then she found it. A glowing rift appeared. Through it flowed something unfamiliar. Luna reached out a trembling hand. It was soft, warm. Luna couldn't believe it. She whispered.

"I'm here."

A beam reached out. Luna disappeared into starlight. A voice like gentle rain echoed.

"Luna the dreamer. Love flows through all stars."

She rejoined the heavens, dreaming clearer dreams. And the rift? Just an old star cloud. But Luna had a new gift: visions that crossed worlds.

From then on, Luna spread kindness like stars. Every dawn she'd weave dreams of friendship through whispered stars. And
